docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY BENOIT, CHARLES M. AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, DAN (OWNER) DBA A A QUALITY AUTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, DAN (OWNER) DBA A A QUALITY AUTO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENOIT, CHARLES M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, DAN (OWNER) DBA A A QUALITY AUTO $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $265.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TYPO ($2,580) ON JUDGM, SHOULD BE $250. CORRECTED IN SYSTEM AND REMAILED TO PARTIES.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DAN RAMIREZ RETURNED FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.
